item.description:
[Priority]

Systemic Significance

Selected by: Gemini-2.5-Flash-Lite, Kimi-K2-Instruct, Llama-3.3-70B, Mistral-Small, Qwen-3-32B, GPT-OSS-120B

item.title: Cheap labour no longer enough as LDC graduation meets Middle East turmoil. [ thedailystar ]
item.description:
[Priority]

item.title: Bangladesh’s missing billions as trade misinvoicing bleeds it dry. [ asiatimes ]
item.description:
[Priority]

Systemic Significance

Selected by: Gemini-2.5-Flash-Lite, Kimi-K2-Instruct, Llama-3.3-70B, Mistral-Small, GPT-OSS-120B

During the tenure of ousted Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina, Bangladesh’s external accounts reflected a dual reality. On the surface was the official narrative of export-driven growth and strengthening foreign exchange reserves. Beneath it, as increasingly detailed by estimates from Global Financial Integrity (GFI) and a growing body of investigations, lay a pattern of systematic capital […]

The post Bangladesh’s missing billions as trade misinvoicing bleeds it dry appeared first on Asia Times.
